ColumnType.description:
Coarse column types riding every SQL result (Evidence's evidenceType
vocabulary): enough for formatting and axis inference, no more.
ColumnType.title: ColumnType

CreateRunIn.description:
Create-or-attach: rank 0 and rank>0 workers, first attempts and resumes
all send the same shape.
CreateRunIn.title: CreateRunIn

PutDatasetIn.description:
A full tabular snapshot, replacing the dataset's previous snapshot.
Rows are scalars only; the server writes the Parquet.
PutDatasetIn.title: PutDatasetIn

RenderBlockOut.description:
One rendered page block. Markdown arrives with value/param expressions
already resolved; components carry verbatim props — the console's
component registry owns their interpretation.
RenderBlockOut.title: RenderBlockOut

schema.title: Response List Datasets Api V1 Datasets Get

put.description:
Replace the org's snapshot of one tabular dataset. Everything under
the org's Parquet prefix is a view in the SQL sandbox and in reports —
this door is how other pillars (factory, pipeline) publish their
tables into the substrate.

schema.title: Response List Projects Api V1 Projects Get
Response Query Latest Api V1 Query Latest Post
Response Query Metrics Api V1 Query Metrics Post

post.description:
Arbitrary DuckDB SQL over the org's own data (views: runs, metrics,
logs) — isolation by construction in the sqlbox, never by WHERE clause.

schema.title: Response List Reports Api V1 Reports Get

post.description: Render an unsaved body — the authoring loop for humans and agents.

put.description:
Compile-validate then upsert: a body the compiler rejects is never
stored (a saved report always renders or fails only on data).

schema.title: Response List Runs Api V1 Runs Get
Response Get Run Lineage Api V1 Runs  Run Id  Lineage Get
Response Run Logs Api V1 Runs  Run Id  Logs Get
